title: Acadia (ACAD) Q4 Earnings Lag, Sales Beat Estimates, Stock Down
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reported Q4 2023 earnings results with mixed outcomes. Acadia reported fourth-quarter 2023 earnings of $0.28 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32. However, the company recorded total revenues of $231 million in the fourth quarter, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $223 million. For full year 2023, Acadia generated revenues of $726.4 million, which increased 40.4% year over year. In 2023, the company recorded a loss of $0.37 per share compared with a loss of $1.34 in 2022. The earnings miss was attributed to higher operating expenses related to the commercial expansion of DAYBUE following its 2023 approval. Despite the earnings miss, the strong revenue beat and improved full-year performance demonstrated solid commercial execution.
